commands: sudo su - ubuntu -c 'pm2 jlist' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log(JSON.stringify({status:p?.pm2_env?.status,restarts:p?.pm2_env?.restart_time,uptime:p?.pm2_env?.pm_uptime,unstable:p?.pm2_env?.unstable_restarts},null,2));});"
